items.source: Wat is die ware rede waarom jy dit nie wil doen nie?
refs: What's the real reason you don't want to do this?

items.source: Ek het skoon van haar vergeet.
refs: I forgot all about her.

items.source: My oom is gediagnoseer met bloedkanker.
refs: My uncle has been diagnosed with leukemia.

items.source: Sy het haar seun alleen in die kar gelos.
refs: She left her son alone in the car.

items.source: Carol het 'n hoofpyn.
refs: Carol has a headache.

items.source: Dis nie hoe ek wil hê dinge moet wees nie.
refs: That isn't how I want things to be.
That's not how I want things to be.

items.source: Sy het 'n kêrel.
refs: She has a boyfriend.

items.source: Tom identifiseer homself als 'n heiden.
refs: Tom self-identifies as a heathen.

items.source: Ich bin 1968 in Tokio geboren.
refs: I was born in Tokyo in 1968.

items.source: Tom hou van die mense wat andere manipuleer nie.
refs: Tom doesn't like people who manipulate others.

items.source: Sy't vandag sy middagete gebring.
refs: She brought his lunch today.

items.source: Kan jy n Engelse brief skryf?
refs: Can you write a letter in English?

items.source: Jy sal daarvoor betaal.
refs: You will pay for it.

items.source: Ek het nog altyd 'n sagte plekkie vir Mary gehad.
refs: I have always had a soft spot in my heart for Mary.

items.source: Ek het 'n droeë vel.
refs: I have dry skin.

items.source: Ek's nog steeds lief vir jou.
refs: I still love you.

items.source: Ons is net betyds vir die laaste trein.
refs: We are just in time for the last train.
We're just in time for the last train.

items.source: Ons plan is om 'n loop deur die park te neem na middagete.
refs: After lunch today, our plan is to take a walk in the park.

items.source: Is hierdie 'n kat?
refs: Is this a cat?

items.source: Tom het niks vir homself gevat nie.
refs: Tom didn't take anything for himself.

items.source: Ek dink nie dit is die moeite werd om te doen nie.
refs: I don't think that's worth doing.

items.source: Ek het net 'n bietjie stoom afgeblaas.
refs: I was just blowing off steam.

items.source: Pragtige dag, is dit nie?
refs: Beautiful day, isn't it?

items.source: Tom soek 'n maklike manier om gewig te verloor.
refs: Tom is looking for an easy way to lose weight.

items.source: Ek is meer as dankbaar vir jou hulp.
refs: I am more than grateful to you for your help.

items.source: Welkom in ons huis!
refs: Welcome to our home!

items.source: Ek wil hom leer ken.
refs: I want to get to know him.

items.source: Tom sal jou wen.
refs: Tom will beat you.

items.source: Die lug is blou, die see is ook blou. Die lug en die see is blou.
refs: The sky is blue, the sea is also blue. The sky and the sea are blue.

items.source: Hy het gesterf gedurende sy terugkeer na Engeland.
refs: He died as he was returning to England.

items.source: Ek het gedog jy gee om vir haar.
refs: I thought you cared about her.

items.source: Tom het twee meisies.
refs: Tom has two girlfriends.

items.source: Die ou man het op die grond geval.
refs: The old man fell down on the ground.

items.source: Ek sal dit nie weer doen nie.
refs: I will not do it again.

items.source: Ons ken mekaar nogal goed.
refs: We know each other pretty well.

items.source: Dis wat ek gekoop het in Spanje.
refs: This is what I bought in Spain.

items.source: Tom wil tyd met my spandeer.
refs: Tom wants to spend time with me.

items.source: Die klip is swaar.
refs: The stone is heavy.

items.source: Ek sal nie die deur sluit nie.
refs: I'm not going to lock the door.

items.source: Jou das is skeef.
refs: Your tie is crooked.

items.source: Moet niks glo van Tom vir jou vertel nie.
refs: Don't believe anything Tom tells you.

items.source: Dis nie 'n grappie nie.
refs: This isn't a joke.

items.source: Tom gaan nie volgende naweek by ons bly nie.
refs: Tom won't be staying with us next weekend.

items.source: Moenie die hond met 'n klip gooi nie.
refs: Don't throw a stone at the dog.

items.source: Ek wil nie van hom hoor nie.
refs: I don't want to hear about him.

items.source: Kan ek vir jou 'n drankie maak?
refs: Can I fix you a drink?

items.source: Appels is gewoonlik groen, geel of rooi.
refs: Apples are usually green, yellow, or red.

items.source: Tom het nie sokkies gedra nie.
refs: Tom did not wear socks.
Tom was not wearing socks.
Tom wasn't wearing socks.

items.source: Ek wil nie laat wees nie.
refs: I don't want to be late.

items.source: Wie se kar is dit?
refs: Whose car is that?
Whose car is this?

items.source: Ek wonder of mens kan leef met slegs twee uur slaap per nag.
refs: I wonder whether man could live with only two hours' sleep a night.

items.source: Ek is om verlief te val op jou.
refs: I'm falling in love with you.

items.source: Dit is egter nie moontlik nie.
refs: This, however, is not possible.

items.source: Dit is 'n mooi huis.
refs: It's a pretty house.

items.source: Ek het gedink iets was vreemd.
refs: I thought something was strange.
I thought that something was strange.

items.source: Grawe 'n diep gat.
refs: Dig a deep hole.

items.source: Ek gaan slaap om tien.
refs: I go to bed about ten.

items.source: Hulle is bekommerd oor haar.
refs: They're concerned about her.

items.source: Sami sal die reëls verduidelik.
refs: Sami will explain the rules.

items.source: Hoe voel jy oor hulle?
refs: How do you feel about them?

items.source: Tom het nie alles gedoen wat hy gesê hy gedoen het nie.
refs: Tom didn't do everything he said he did.

items.source: Ek sal terug wees in 'n uur.
refs: I'll be back in an hour.

items.source: Ek het 'n plek om te bly gesoek.
refs: I looked for a place to stay.

items.source: Is jy kwaad vir my?
refs: Are you mad at me?

items.source: Tom kon nie glo wat aan die gang is nie.
refs: Tom couldn't believe what was happening.

items.source: Wees rustig tydens die les.
refs: Be quiet during the lesson.

items.source: Ek is al gewoond daaraan teen nou.
refs: I'm used to it by now.

items.source: Ek wil nie weer daarvan hoor nie.
refs: I don't want to hear about it again.

items.source: Ek sal moet terugkom na jou.
refs: I'm going to have to get back to you.

items.source: Waar kan ek 'n vuvuzela kry?
refs: Where can I get a vuvuzela?

items.source: My naam is Tom. Wat's joune?
refs: My name is Tom. What's yours?

items.source: Volgens alle bekende reëls van die lugvaart is daar nie 'n manier nie dat 'n by vlieg mag.
refs: According to all known laws of aviation, there is no way that a bee should be able to fly.

items.source: Ons het dit gekoop.
refs: We bought it.
We bought this.

items.source: Dankie vir jou pragtige poskaart.
refs: Thank you for your beautiful postcard.

items.source: Sami haat dit om oor geld te praat.
refs: Sami hates talking about money.

items.source: My baas was tevrede met wat ek gedoen het.
refs: My boss was satisfied with what I did.

items.source: Hoe oud is jy?
refs: How old are you?

items.source: Gister het ons slegte weer gehad.
refs: We had bad weather yesterday.

items.source: Die kos het glad nie so sleg geproe nie.
refs: The food didn't taste all that bad.

items.source: "Kan ek assebleif met Tom praat?" "Ek is jammer, hy het sopas gegaan."
refs: "Can I speak to Tom, please?" "I'm sorry, he just left."

items.source: Ek sal nie langer as twee of drie ure neem nie.
refs: I won't be more than two or three hours.

items.source: Dit maak nie soveel saak nie.
refs: It doesn't matter so much.

items.source: Die baba het vir my geglimlag.
refs: The baby smiled at me.

items.source: Tom was baie bang gewees.
refs: Tom was very scared.

items.source: Is jy 'n elektrisiën in 'n teater?
refs: Are you an electrician in a theater?

items.source: Die dame is bewusteloos.
refs: The lady is unconscious.

items.source: Wanneer en waar kan ons ontmoet?
refs: What time and where could we meet?

items.source: Ek wil iets sê.
refs: I want to say something.

items.source: Ek het nog altyd harde werk met sukses in die lewe assosieer.
refs: I have always identified hard work with success in life.

items.source: Jy moet dit probeer.
refs: You should try it.

items.source: My skoonma glimlag nooit.
refs: My mother-in-law never smiles.

items.source: Het jy besluit om Japan toe te gaan?
refs: Have you decided to go to Japan?

items.source: Ek wil deelneem aan die protes.
refs: I want to participate in the protest.

items.source: Ek het slegs 'n nuwe paar skoene gekoop.
refs: I just bought a new pair of shoes.

items.source: Tom het 'n storie daaroor geskryf.
refs: Tom wrote a story about that.

items.source: Hulle het gesê dat hulle bly was om jou te sien.
refs: They said they were glad to see you.

items.source: Ek sal so gou as moontlik terugkom na jou.
refs: I'll get back to you as soon as I can.

items.source: Ek is net 'n beginner.
refs: I'm just a beginner.

items.source: Ek het twee katte.
refs: I have two cats.

items.source: Jy het nie 'n kêrel nodig nie.
refs: You don't need a boyfriend.

items.source: Tom wil nie die res van sy lewe in die tronk spandeer nie.
refs: Tom doesn't want to spend the rest of his life in jail.

items.source: Ek sal nou terugkom by jou.
refs: I'll get right back to you.

items.source: Ek het vir haar 'n nuwe motor gekoop.
refs: I bought her a new car.

items.source: Ek dink hy weet van ons.
refs: I think he knows about us.

items.source: Ek sal reg agter jou wees.
refs: I'll be right behind you.

items.source: Los volgende Saterdag middag oop asseblief.
refs: Please leave next Saturday afternoon free.

items.source: Tom is sopas terug vanaf Boston.
refs: Tom just got back from Boston.

items.source: Tom mag dit dalk kan doen, maar ek betwyfel dit.
refs: Tom might be able to do that, but I doubt it.

items.source: Mamma is besig om te werk.
refs: Mom is busy working.
Mum is busy working.

items.source: Dis 'n goeie begin.
refs: It's a good start.

items.source: Tom was ook dronk.
refs: Tom was also drunk.

items.source: Ek het nie geweet jy kan so goed Frans praat nie.
refs: I didn't know that you could speak French so well.

items.source: Hy kan 'n bietjie Engels praat.
refs: He can speak a little English.

items.source: Hierdie hond is van my.
refs: This dog is mine.

items.source: Ek het oor haar rond gevra.
refs: I asked around about her.

items.source: Hierde boek was baie interessant.
refs: This book was very interesting.

items.source: Snags is alle katte grou.
refs: All cats are grey in the dark.
At night all cats are grey.

items.source: Hierdie tomaties het geen smaak nie.
refs: These tomatoes don't have any taste.

items.source: Daar is niks snobisties oor haar nie.
refs: She has nothing snobbish about her.

items.source: My oupa het sy eie meubels gemaak.
refs: My grandfather used to make furniture for himself.

items.source: Die nuwe biblioteek is in aanbou sedert verlede jaar.
refs: The new library has been under construction since last year.

items.source: Hy het huis toe gekom.
refs: He's come home.

items.source: My vader het gese ek mag nie alleen oorsee gaan nie.
refs: My father said that I may not go overseas alone.

items.source: Ek is lief vir jou seun.
refs: I love your son.

items.source: Die pensioen is nie genoeg vir die lewenskoste nie.
refs: The pension is not sufficient for living expenses.

items.source: Die pakkie weeg meer as een pond.
refs: The parcel weighs more than one pound.

items.source: Hy is geen apteker nie.
refs: He's not a pharmacist.

items.source: Hoe drink jy jou koffie?
refs: How do you like your coffee?

items.source: Die sproeier skiet 'n stroom water oor die gras.
refs: The sprinkler is shooting out a stream of water onto the grass.

items.source: Ek dog jy sou kwaad vir my wees.
refs: I thought that you might be mad at me.
I thought you might be mad at me.

items.source: Niks is heilig nie.
refs: Nothing is holy.

items.source: Sy is 'n bietjie 'n handvol.
refs: She's a bit of a handful.

items.source: Hulle is die enigste studente wat Sjinees studeer.
refs: They are the only students who study Chinese.

items.source: Jy ken nie my pa nie, doen jy?
refs: You don't know my dad, do you?

items.source: Sy is soos my eie kind.
refs: She is like my own child.

items.source: Jy mag nou maar gaan meneer.
refs: You can go now, sir.

items.source: Tom was toe besig.
refs: Tom was busy then.

items.source: Ek sou ongelukkig nie baie goeie geselskap wees nie.
refs: I'm afraid I wouldn't be very good company.

items.source: Ek is in 'n toneelstuk.
refs: I am in a play.

items.source: Hoekom moet ek oor hulle omgee?
refs: Why should I care about them?

items.source: My Fraans is sleg.
refs: My French is bad.

items.source: Studente lees nie baie boeke nie as gevolg van TV en strokiesprente.
refs: Students don't read many books because of TV and comics.

items.source: Ek ken hom nie.
refs: I don't know him.

items.source: Hoekom het jy na hulle geluister?
refs: Why did you listen to them?

items.source: Ons sal hierdie verder bespreek.
refs: We will continue the discussion.

items.source: Tom skryf selde aan sy ouers.
refs: Tom seldom writes to his parents.

items.source: Ek was bekommerd oor hulle.
refs: I've been concerned about them.

items.source: Mooi dag, is dit nie?
refs: Beautiful day, isn't it?

items.source: Julle het almal gedoen wat julle kon.
refs: You all did what you could.

items.source: Kan ek jou help?
refs: Can I help you?
